\tzpentry{ID3776}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3776 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} B \propto \sqrt{\rho}\, L^{1/2}\Omega,\qquad \mu \propto M R^2 \Omega, \end{equation}
